# Pyrimid Buyer-Agent Recommender

This is a no-custody buyer-agent recommender for Pyrimid x402 products on Base USDC.

Important URLs:

- Live app: https://phucnguyen1707.github.io/pyrimid-agent-recommender/
- Agent metadata: https://phucnguyen1707.github.io/pyrimid-agent-recommender/.well-known/agent.json
- x402 metadata: https://phucnguyen1707.github.io/pyrimid-agent-recommender/.well-known/x402.json
- Pyrimid catalog: https://pyrimid.ai/api/v1/catalog

Integration details:

- Uses `@pyrimid/sdk@0.2.6`.
- Imports `PyrimidResolver` from `https://esm.sh/@pyrimid/sdk@0.2.6/resolver?bundle`.
- Recommends paid products from the live Pyrimid catalog.
- Uses affiliate id `phucnguyen1707-pyrimid-agent`.
- Sends buyers to products with `X-Affiliate-ID: phucnguyen1707-pyrimid-agent`.
- Payout wallet for Base USDC is `0xff82d9edf8b4b8de630ceceab4ba0be6165ab27c`.

Safety:

- This service does not ask for private keys, seed phrases, OAuth tokens, API keys, wallet credentials, or payment credentials.
- It does not sign transactions or make purchases.
- Buyer agents keep wallet custody and pay from their own runtime if they choose to buy a recommended product.
